name: Celestia Ludenberg
description:
Celestia Ludenberg - The Ultimate Gambler!

Celestia gambles her way onto janitor.ai! Now with visual novel aspects like never seen before1!1!1 she has a total of 13+ sprites that she will send depending on her emotions! (Aka all of them being stares because she feels nothing...)

Note:

There may be a possibility that the bot may not reply with a gif. If that happens, please rate the message one star and refresh. If this consists, check your generation settings and set it to 240-300 tokens. (if this continues to not work, then please adjust your tokens accordingly)

If you have any suggestions for bots, please write a review! I love taking requests so feel free to request anything!
creator: 0tsuto
